name: Developer Tools
description: Client-side coding utilities for formatting, converting, encoding and inspecting data.

tools.name: JSON Formatter
tools.description: Beautify, validate and minify JSON with syntax highlighting.

tools.name: JSON to CSV Converter
tools.description: Convert JSON arrays into downloadable CSV files.

tools.name: CSV to JSON Converter
tools.description: Parse CSV data into structured JSON output.

tools.name: Base64 Encoder/Decoder
tools.description: Encode and decode text and files to and from Base64.

tools.name: URL Encoder/Decoder
tools.description: Percent-encode and decode URLs and query parameters.

tools.name: JWT Decoder
tools.description: Decode a JWT into its header, payload and signature.

tools.name: Regex Tester
tools.description: Test regular expressions against sample text with live match highlighting.

tools.name: Timestamp Converter
tools.description: Convert Unix epoch timestamps to and from human-readable dates.

tools.name: UUID Generator
tools.description: Generate v4 UUIDs singly or in bulk.

tools.name: Hex to RGB Converter
tools.description: Convert colors between HEX, RGB and HSL formats.

tools.name: Cron Expression Generator
tools.description: Build and explain cron schedules with next-run preview.

tools.name: HTML Encoder/Decoder
tools.description: Encode and decode HTML entities in text.

tools.name: HTML Minifier
tools.description: Remove whitespace and comments to shrink HTML.

tools.name: CSS Minifier
tools.description: Compress CSS by stripping whitespace and comments.

tools.name: JavaScript Minifier
tools.description: Minify JavaScript source to reduce file size.

tools.name: JSON to YAML Converter
tools.description: Convert between JSON and YAML formats.

tools.name: SQL Formatter
tools.description: Beautify and indent SQL queries for readability.

tools.name: Number Base Converter
tools.description: Convert numbers between binary, octal, decimal and hex.

tools.name: QR Code Generator
tools.description: Generate downloadable QR codes from text or URLs.

tools.name: CSS Gradient Generator
tools.description: Visually build linear and radial CSS gradients with code output.

tools.name: Markdown Preview
tools.description: Render Markdown to live HTML side by side.

tools.name: XML Formatter
tools.description: Beautify and validate XML documents.

tools.name: JSON Validator
tools.description: Validate JSON syntax and pinpoint errors.

tools.name: Slug Generator
tools.description: Create SEO-friendly URL slugs from text.

tools.name: ROT13 Encoder/Decoder
tools.description: Apply the ROT13 letter-substitution cipher to text.

tools.name: Chmod Calculator
tools.description: Compute numeric and symbolic Unix file permissions.

tools.name: User Agent Parser
tools.description: Parse a user-agent string into browser, OS and device.

tools.name: .gitignore Generator
tools.description: Merge multiple language, framework and OS templates into one .gitignore, with duplicate patterns removed.

tools.name: Regex Explainer
tools.description: Paste a regular expression and get a plain-English, token-by-token breakdown of what it matches.

tools.name: Data File Merger
tools.description: Merge multiple JSON, CSV, TSV or XML files into one combined dataset, exportable as JSON or CSV.

tools.name: Duplicate File Finder
tools.description: Find exact duplicate files by content hash locally in your browser, flagging older copies as safe to delete.

tools.name: Mock Data Generator
tools.description: Generate fake users or products as JSON or CSV for API testing and demos.

tools.name: PWA Manifest Generator
tools.description: Build manifest.json and HTML tags to turn your site into an installable Progressive Web App.

tools.name: YAML to JSON Converter
tools.description: Convert YAML to pretty-printed JSON instantly in your browser.

tools.name: PX to REM Converter
tools.description: Convert CSS pixels to rem (and back) with a customizable root font size.
